handoff.reason: Plan authored. 7 phases ready for sequential execution starting with source-headers coverage flood.

execution_rules.gate_behavior: Phases 1 and 2 require explicit approval before continuing. Phases 3-7 may run without gate.

hard_constraints: No breaking changes to public ElementData or GraphData interfaces
Each phase must pass vitest before commit
Source-headers phase runs first — RAG coverage is the unlock for all semantic work

communication_log.note: 7-phase phased plan created from DISPATCH-2026-05-12-004. Phases: source-headers, tree-sitter-verify, export-edges, what-imports-fix, rag-search-constraint, viz-fields, ai-truncation.

Phase 1 Source-Headers Coverage Flood complete. Before: defined=278 (11%), stale=1782, partial=20, missing=343. After --source-headers --overwrite-headers + de-dup: header_present (defined+stale+partial)=2080/2423=86%, missing=343/2423=14%. Note: 1782 stale elements have correct headers but rawExports mismatch on interfaces/type aliases — this is a Phase 2 scanner gap (extractRawExports doesn't capture export interface/type). Source files repaired: 3 files (header-generator.ts, header-fact.ts, semantic-header-parser.ts) were truncated by prior --source-headers run and restored from git. 173 duplicate header blocks de-duped across src/. Hard stop: awaiting Phase 1 approval before Phase 2.

Phase 2 Tree-Sitter Field Verification complete. Audited all 6 language extractors (TS, Python, Go, Rust, Java, C++). Found 2 real gaps: (1) Rust: #[derive], #[cfg] attributes not captured — added extractRustAttributes() method walking previousSibling attribute_item nodes; wired into function_item, struct_item, enum_item, trait_item. (2) Java: class_declaration, interface_declaration, enum_declaration missing complexity field — added estimateComplexity(node) call (method_declaration already had it). Build clean. vitest: 68 failed/1457 passed — all 68 are pre-existing failures (confirmed via git stash). Zero new regressions. Commit: fcc5869. Hard stop: awaiting Phase 2 approval before Phase 3.
